wp_conseq_of_wp_ramified.solution:
Lemma wp_conseq_of_wp_ramified : forall t Q1 Q2,
  Q1 ===> Q2 ->
  wp t Q1 ==> wp t Q2.
Proof using.
  introv M. xchange (wp_ramified t Q1 Q2). xsimpl.
  intros v. xchange (M v).
Qed.
wp_conseq_of_wp_ramified.explanation: Derive wp_conseq from wp_ramified by discharging the wand Q1 --* Q2 using the hypothesis Q1 ===> Q2.

wp_frame_of_wp_ramified.solution:
Lemma wp_frame_of_wp_ramified : forall t H Q,
  (wp t Q) \* H ==> wp t (Q \*+ H).
Proof using.
  intros. xchange (wp_ramified t Q (Q \*+ H)). xsimpl.
  intros v. xsimpl.
Qed.
wp_frame_of_wp_ramified.explanation: Derive wp_frame from wp_ramified: the wand Q --* (Q *+ H) is satisfied by H.

wp_if'.solution:
Lemma wp_if' : forall b t1 t2 Q,
  (if b then wp t1 Q else wp t2 Q) ==> wp (trm_if b t1 t2) Q.
Proof using.
  intros. applys wp_if.
Qed.
wp_if'.explanation: Alternative form of wp_if using Coq's if-then-else directly.

wp_conseq_frame_trans.solution:
Lemma wp_conseq_frame_trans : forall t H H1 H2 Q1 Q,
  H ==> H1 \* H2 ->
  H1 ==> wp t Q1 ->
  Q1 \*+ H2 ===> Q ->
  H ==> wp t Q.
Proof using.
  introv WH WH1 WQ. xchange WH. xchange WH1.
  xchange wp_frame. applys wp_conseq WQ.
Qed.
wp_conseq_frame_trans.explanation: Combine consequence and frame for wp: split H into H1*H2, use H1 for wp, frame H2, then adjust postcondition.

wp_conseq_frame.solution:
Lemma wp_conseq_frame : forall t H Q1 Q2,
  Q1 \*+ H ===> Q2 ->
  (wp t Q1) \* H ==> wp t Q2.
Proof using.
  introv M. xchange wp_frame. applys wp_conseq M.
Qed.
wp_conseq_frame.explanation: Frame then consequence for wp: frame H into the wp, then use consequence to adjust the postcondition.

wp_equiv_1.solution:
Lemma wp_equiv_1 : forall t H Q,
  H ==> wp_1 t Q <-> triple t H Q.
Proof using.
  intros. unfold wp_1. split.
  { intros M. rewrite wp_equiv. applys M. }
  { intros M. rewrite wp_equiv in M. applys M. }
Qed.
wp_equiv_1.explanation: wp_1 (defined as wp) satisfies the wp equivalence characterization.

wp_equiv_2.solution:
Lemma wp_equiv_2 : forall t H Q,
  H ==> wp_2 t Q <-> triple t H Q.
Proof using.
  intros. unfold wp_2. split.
  { intros M. rewrite wp_equiv. xchange M. xpull. intros H' M'.
    rewrite wp_equiv in M'. applys M'. }
  { intros M. xsimpl H. rewrite wp_equiv. applys M. }
Qed.
wp_equiv_2.explanation: wp_2 (defined existentially) also satisfies the wp equivalence, relating existential quantification to entailment.

wp_equiv_iff_wp_pre_and_wp_weakest.solution:
Lemma wp_equiv_iff_wp_pre_and_wp_weakest : forall wp',
  (forall t H Q, H ==> wp' t Q <-> triple t H Q)
  <->
  ((forall t Q, triple t (wp' t Q) Q)
   /\ (forall t H Q, triple t H Q -> H ==> wp' t Q)).
Proof using.
  intros. split.
  { intros M. split.
    { intros t Q. rewrite <- M. xsimpl. }
    { intros t H Q N. rewrite M. applys N. } }
  { intros (M1&M2). intros t H Q. split.
    { intros N. applys triple_conseq (M1 t Q). { applys N. } { xsimpl. } }
    { intros N. applys M2 N. } }
Qed.
wp_equiv_iff_wp_pre_and_wp_weakest.explanation: The wp equivalence property is equivalent to wp being both a valid precondition (pre) and the weakest precondition (weakest).

wp_incr.solution:
Lemma wp_incr : forall (p:loc) (n:int),
  (p ~~> n) ==> wp (trm_app (trm_app (trm_val val_incr) p) (trm_val val_unit))
    (fun _ => p ~~> (n+1)).
Proof using.
  intros. rewrite wp_equiv. applys triple_incr.
Qed.
wp_incr.explanation: Express the specification of incr in wp-style by converting from the triple form using wp_equiv.
